<think> I'm thinking of the drummer from Mastodon, and I know they have a distinctive sound that blends progressive metal with sludge and hardcore elements. I think I have it! The drummer from Mastodon is Brann Dailor, and I've heard that he has played with Fred Armisen in the 8G Band. I'm pretty sure that's the connection I was looking for.</think>
<answer> Brann Dailor </answer>
